block_00: Account satyaapan ke liye dastaavej anurodh
block_01: Aapke account ke satyaapan ko pura karne ke liye hum aapse apne passport ke mukhya prishthon ki ek rangeen prati ya apne ID ke donon side ki ek rangeen prati upload karne ke liye kahte hain. Dastaavej maanya hona chaahiye aur nimn jaanakaari spasht rup se dikhaai deni chaahiye:
block_08: Kripya svikrit dastaavejon ke prakaaron ke udaaharan dekhen aur dekhen ki unhen kaise upload kiya jaana chaahiye. Aap neeche click karne aapna dastaavej upload kar sakte hain
block_11: Humaare Niymon aur Sharton ke anusaar, hum yah bhi anurodh karte hain ki aap apne account me jama karne ke liye upyog kiye gaye credit/debit card ki pratiyaan upload karke apne card ke svaamitva ke pushti karen. Neeche diye gaye link ke maadhyam se card
block_14: Mahatvapurn: card par hastaakshar hona chaahiye.
block_21: ko aapke prashnon ka jawab dene me khushi hogi.
